**什么是ADHD?**
注意缺陷多动障碍 (ADHD) 俗称为“多动症”，其“注意缺陷”和“多动冲动”的症状表现会随着年龄增长而变化。

**成人ADHD常见表现**
*   经常拖延工作
*   经常丢失或错放工作或生活的必需品
*   忘记约会或工作任务等
*   易怒、情绪调节能力差等
*   经常很随意地从一件未完成的事跳到另一件事上，安排活动、解决问题等缺乏计划性，没有时间观念等
*   经常打断别人谈话
*   难与他人维持稳定的关系
*   无节制地参加娱乐活动或购物
*   说话不假思索、做决定过快等

**预约方式**
*   关注“上海市精神卫生中心”微信公众号，点击就医助手-就医服务-门诊预约，选择...-心理咨询门诊一成人注意缺陷多...(成人ADHD)

### **登上“船中船”**
### **全船仅4%贵宾拥有的奢华体验**
登上MSC地中海游艇会,奢享体验由此开始!

“戴上专属手环，远离人群喧闹和排队烦恼，哪怕是春节这样的旺季，也能从容出行，把时间和空间都留给自己。

从码头开始，整个行程都有专属通道和管家服务，船上所有剧院、餐厅等设施都能优先体验，还有游艇会的贵宾专属区域，专属甲板、餐厅酒吧、电梯等等。既能感受‘大船’的丰富多彩,也能享受‘小船’的私密静奢。”

---

### **关于MSC地中海游艇会**

**24H管家服务**
“我愿称之为古希腊掌管服务的神, 24小时管家,让您的出游全程0负担,有事管家会出手,主打一个安心感爆棚。担心英语交流不够流畅?放心,中文管家也能安排。”

---

### **专享特权礼遇,很Real也很Chill**

*   **尊贵宾登/离船礼遇**
    “很多人问它的含金量从码头到离船都尽显尊贵,船内VIP休息室、专属行李托运、所有饮品为您准备,无论是登船、离船都非常高效率且丝滑过关。”

据说, 狗在太古时代曾是这个世界的统治者。
当时的狗拥有更强韧的肉体与凶猛的本能, 是名叫“狼”的野兽。狼在大陆上纵横驱驰, 时而独行, 时而成群结队, 日复一日与其他族群争斗不休。狼当仁不让, 堪称陆地之王。
对于方才拥有些许文明曙光的人类来说, 狼是一种威胁。然而, 人类竟试图制御这陆地之王。不, 王终究是王, 岂能被制御? 人类于是制造出了一种任凭驱使的狼。犬就如同折断狼的獠牙, 改良品种以削减它的凶猛, 使其成为对人顺从的狼。
据说那就是狗的由来…………

什么是绿豆蒜?

566-JBB

台湾的绿豆蒜是一种传统的甜品,与上述提到的经过特殊处理的蒜头不同。这里的“绿豆蒜”实际上是用绿豆为主要原料制成的一种甜品,其中“蒜”字在这里并非指真正的蒜,而是闽南语中“碎”的意思,因此“绿豆蒜”也可以理解为“碎绿豆”。

制作台湾绿豆蒜的过程大致如下:
1. 将绿豆去皮,浸泡后煮至软烂。
2. 将煮熟的绿豆捣碎成泥状(也可以保留一些颗粒感)。
3. 加入适量的糖和水,用中小火慢慢熬煮,期间不断搅拌以防止粘锅。
4. 煮至浓稠状即可出锅,有时还会加入少量的琼脂或太白粉增加稠度。
5. 放凉后可放入冰箱冷藏,食用时更加清凉爽口。

绿豆蒜甜而不腻,具有清热解毒的功效,在炎热的夏天尤其受到人们的喜爱。它是台湾夜市和家庭中常见的消暑甜品之一。

time Berlin's summer was blazing, we - Hailey Mader and
myself, Zoe Beech - were all anyone could talk about.
Sprawling and old, The Spa was situated in a converted
primary school somewhere in northern Brandenburg. Its hall-
ways still smelled chalky like the inside of a brick, and most
of the bedrooms, once classrooms, were shared by two to
three girls. But I was alone, living in what I assumed had once
been a very generous broom closet, with my own square
window, blue painted chair with matching desk, and a
porcelain sink adorned with a halo of dark-brownish mould.
I liked to imagine that the ring of mould was a well-run city
of tiny spores, filled with good, non-violent mould citizens,
maybe even with mould artists and mould curators doing
coke at tiny mould clubs.
I spent most of my time in this sort of useless daydream,
elbows pressed into the soft wood of the desk, staring out at
the unbearably still farmland and then, lightning, an inter-
ruption to my doldrums— body writhing in a lake of blood,
flashes strobing, like a Rihanna music video.
And just as fast as it crested,
or a field or mildewy sink or the
...au Klein's neck.
...the word par-a-noi-a, letting each syllable
a ping-pong ball out of her wet mouth. She was in
... forties but dressed for her sixties, with roadkill-
... and potato-sack skirts. We had at this point spent
...s together and I was certain she was living vicari-
...ough me, filling the void of her own existence with
...ny answers and traumas, extracting information she would
eventually sell to the tabloids, or her own tell-all.
'Zoe, how did sex make you feel?'
'Did you ever fantasise about Hailey?'
Her voice sounded scripted as if she were recording an
audio cassette from a language class.

ENGLISH ---
Dear Ladies and Gentlemen.
I was born in Russia. I fled Russia to save my life. I have no citizenship of any country of the world. I apatrid-de-jure. I have Stateless Person's Travel Document. This document was given out by the government of Ukraine in 2000, but term of its action was terminated. To receive in France same Travel Document it is impossible, as I have arrived from Russia! I do not have real access to medical aid. (Itself I buy all medicines if I have money). I have no right to receive education in France! I do not study at school. But very much I want to study! I have no right on habitation. I cannot receive the information on the rights anywhere. I am deprived a real legal aid. I have no right to work. Therefore I search for money to pay for work of the attorney, to purchase meal, to pay for dwelling. I have no money to a meal. I have no money to clothes. I have no money to buy medicines. I have no books, TV. I do not have all that you have. I do not have anything. But I want to live, study, work. I ask your help. I speak in Russian, Ukrainian, Polish. I understand slavic languages. Please DO NOT RUMPLE this paper.

DEUTSCH ---
Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren.
Ich bin in Russland geboren. Ich lief aus Russland weg. Ich rettete mir das Leben. Ich habe die Staatsangehörigkeit keines Landes der Welt. Ich apatrid-de-jure. Ich habe Stateless Person's Travel Document. Ihn hat die Regierung Ukraine in 2000 ausgestellt, aber der Termin seiner Handlung hat geendet. In Frankreich solchen Travel Document zu bekommen es ist unmöglich, da ich aus Russland angekommen bin! Ich habe keinen Zugriff auf die ärztliche Betreuung (ich kaufe alle Medikamente wenn ich das Geld habe). Ich kann nicht in Frankreich die Bildung bekommen! Ich lerne in der Schule nicht. Aber sehr will ich lernen! Ich habe die Rechte auf den Wohnraum nicht. Ich kann nirgends die Information über meine Rechte bekommen. Ich bin der Rechtshilfe beraubt. Ich habe die Rechte nicht, zu arbeiten. Ich habe kein Geld, um, die Nahrung zu kaufen. Ich habe kein Geld, um, die Medikamente zu kaufen. Ich habe kein Geld, um, die Kleidung zu kaufen. Ich habe keine Bücher, des Fernsehers und alles, dass Sie haben. Ich habe nichts. Aber ich will leben, lernen, arbeiten. Ich bitte Ihrer Hilfe. Ich spreche russisch, ukrainisch, polnisch. Ich verstehe die slawischen Sprachen. Bitte NICHT KNICKEN Sie dieses Papier.

A small welcome gift for you!
The Esse is a typical biscuit of the island of Burano in the northern Lagoon, also known by the name of buranelli. The name is due to its "S" shape. The dessert has a composition rich in nutrients, such as eggs, flour, sugar and butter which, once cooked, last a long time. In the past, the biscuit was prepared by the fishermen's wives, who went away from home for long periods of time to go fishing. In the event that they could not have a good diet, the Esse provided to give the sailors all the energy sufficient to face the sea life.
Have a nice holiday!

年初三, 做小三。
三在中国传统中, 有万物之源、无穷无尽的意味。在当代社会, 礼拜三也往往是人们工作热情最为低落、最需要精神鼓舞的时刻。
因此, 苦于上班的劳动人民就自发形成了礼拜三做小三的习俗, 在这一天, 所有的无产者纷纷走上街头, 走进别人家里做起了小三, 与已婚者同乐
什么知三当三, 你老公选择了我, 你才是小三吧, 搞笑
以前道德观念高, 做小三只敢偷偷摸摸胆战心惊, 生怕被人知道, 现在做小三已经成为一种生活态度, 交友门槛, 人生理念。
当小三 is underrated, 当小三不仅是一个动作, 还是一种心情, 一种 mood in mind, 一种 state of being。如果你没当过小三, 我感到遗憾

别人做小三, 自甘下贱
朋友做小三, 别被发现
自己做小三, 倾城之恋
